prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为8144、6828、6251、9955、11282名，整体呈先升后降再大幅后移趋势。2024年因贵州首年新高考改革，位次从6251骤降至9955（后移3704名），2025年继续后移至11282名（再后移1327名），近两年累计后移约5031名，竞争明显加剧。2025年基准位次约11282名；该校在贵州省物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为85人，2024年86人，2025年88人，2026年大幅扩招至108人，较2025年增加20人，扩招幅度约22.7%。扩招意味着更多录取名额，但供需弹性模型显示扩招会吸引更多考生报考，竞争加剧，位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名在75–84之间波动，整体稳定。作为电力行业龙头高校，在能源电力领域具有显著行业影响力和认可度；该校在2021–2026年声誉评价文件中未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常信号，学校声誉平稳。抖音热度未进入全国前100名榜单，属于一般关注度，未见异常报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A（全国顶尖），动力工程及工程热物理获评A-。电气工程及其自动化、能源动力类等核心招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度数据显示，电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、能源动力（推荐）等该校核心专业社会热度持续走高。贵州省2026年高考总人数约29.9万人，物理类考生约20.8万人（按近年物理类占比约69.7%估算），较2025年物理类20.7万人略有增加，竞争基数小幅扩大。；该校位于北京市，属于跨省招生。在贵州省物理类招生计划从85人增至108人，招生占比有所提升，但北京高校对贵州考生仍具较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年大幅后移趋势、2026年物理类招生计划大幅扩招22.7%（供需弹性反映竞争加剧）、考生规模略有增加、电气/能源类专业社会热度持续走高以及学校声誉平稳等因素，在2025年基准11282名基础上，预计2026年最低位次继续后移至约12770名，区间12270–13270名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8144, 6828, 6251, 9955, and 11282 respectively, showing an overall trend of first rising, then declining, and then significantly dropping. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao reform in Guizhou, the ranking sharply dropped from 6251 to 9955 (a drop of 3704 places). In 2025, it further dropped to 11282 (another drop of 1327 places), with a cumulative drop of about 5031 places over the past two years, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11282. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province was 85 students from 2021 to 2023, 86 in 2024, 88 in 2025, and significantly expanded to 108 in 2026, an increase of 20 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 22.7%. Expansion means more admission slots, but the supply-demand elasticity model shows that expansion will attract more candidates to apply, intensifying competition and causing rankings to drop.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 75 and 84, overall stable. As a leading university in the electric power industry, it has significant industry influence and recognition in the energy and electric power field. From 2021 to 2026, there were no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal application signals in the university's reputation evaluation documents, and its reputation remains stable. Its Douyin popularity did not enter the national top 100 list, indicating general attention and no abnormal application heat signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A (top in the country), and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-. Core enrollment majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Energy and Power Engineering are highly matched with advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2024 major popularity data shows that the university's core majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Energy and Power (recommended) continue to see rising social popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guizhou Province is about 299,000, with about 208,000 Physics Category candidates (estimated based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 69.7%), a slight increase from 207,000 in 2025, indicating a small expansion of the competition base. The university is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. The enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guizhou Province increased from 85 to 108 students, with an increased enrollment proportion, but Beijing universities still have strong regional appeal to Guizhou candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant drop in historical rankings over the past two years, the large expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 by 22.7% (supply-demand elasticity reflecting intensified competition), a slight increase in the number of candidates, the continuously rising social popularity of electrical/energy majors, and the stable university reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 11282, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will continue to drop to approximately 12770, with a range of 12270–13270.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 12770, with a range of 12270–13270. Candidates with rankings within the range are advised to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical, Electronic Information, Computer) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors as safe options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (within 12270) can focus on applying for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation. Avoid majors with obvious social discouragement (Materials, Environmental, Business Administration).

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为1813、1759、2129、2758、2499名。2021–2022年位次在1800名左右波动，2023年后移至2129名，2024年因新高考改革大幅后移至2758名（后移629名），2025年回升至2499名（前移259名）。整体呈波动后移态势，2025年基准位次约2499名；该校在贵州省历史类招生计划2021–2023年均为6人，2024年5人，2025年4人，2026年维持4人，与2025年持平。计划人数较少且连续两年不变，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科排名约第84名。虽以工科见长，但作为211高校对文科考生仍具一定吸引力；该校声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常信号。抖音热度一般，未进入全国前100名榜单；该校优势学科集中于电气工程（A）和动力工程及工程热物理（A-），均为工科，与历史类招生专业（法学、行政管理、网络与新媒体、公共事业管理）无直接学科评估关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 历史类招生专业中，法学社会热度为分化观望（考公优势明显但竞争激烈），网络与新媒体社会热度为明显劝退。贵州省2026年历史类考生约9.06万人（按近年历史类占比约30.3%估算），较2025年历史类9.01万人略有增加，竞争基数小幅扩大。；该校位于北京市，对贵州文科考生仍具地域吸引力。但历史类招生计划仅4人，名额极少，位次波动受个别高分考生报考行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动趋势、2026年历史类招生计划与2025年持平、考生规模略有增加、文科专业社会热度分化等因素，在2025年基准2499名基础上，预计2026年最低位次小幅后移至约2529名，区间2074–2984名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1813, 1759, 2129, 2758, and 2499 respectively. Rankings fluctuated around 1800 in 2021–2022, shifted to 2129 in 2023, dropped significantly to 2758 in 2024 due to the new college entrance exam reform (a drop of 629 places), and rebounded to 2499 in 2025 (an increase of 259 places). Overall, there is a fluctuating downward trend, with a baseline ranking of approximately 2499 in 2025. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guizhou Province was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, 5 in 2024, 4 in 2025, and remains 4 in 2026, consistent with 2025. The small number of planned slots and the unchanged figure for two consecutive years have limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked approximately 84th in the Soft Science Ranking. Although it is strong in engineering, as a 211 university it still holds some appeal for liberal arts students. Its reputation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals. Its popularity on Douyin is moderate, not entering the national top 100 list. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in Electrical Engineering (A) and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-), both engineering fields, which have no direct disciplinary assessment relevance to the History Category majors (Law, Administrative Management, Network and New Media, Public Affairs Management).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Among the History Category majors, Law has a divided social popularity (clear advantage for civil service exams but intense competition), while Network and New Media has a clearly discouraged social popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guizhou Province is approximately 90,600 (estimated based on the recent History Category proportion of about 30.3%), a slight increase from 90,100 in 2025, leading to a small expansion of the competitive base. The university is located in Beijing, which still holds regional appeal for Guizhou liberal arts students. However, with only 4 planned slots in the History Category, the number is extremely small, and ranking fluctuations are significantly influenced by the application behavior of individual high-scoring students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating trend of historical rankings, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan being consistent with 2025, a slight increase in the number of examinees, and the divided social popularity of liberal arts majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 2499, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly drop to approximately 2529, with a range of 2074–2984.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2529, range 2074–2984. There are only 4 majors in the History Category, with very few slots. If your ranking falls within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 Law as a reach, and Tier 3 Public Affairs Management as a safety. Although Law has divided social popularity, its clear advantage for civil service exams makes it worth considering. Network and New Media has a clearly discouraged social popularity, so careful evaluation is needed.
